query:
ALTER TABLE bolsistas 
ADD COLUMN accessCode VARCHAR(50),
ADD COLUMN isActive BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
ADD COLUMN usedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
ADD COLUMN updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
MODIFY userId INT NULL,
MODIFY email VARCHAR(320) NULL;

ALTER TABLE bolsistas ADD UNIQUE KEY uk_accessCode (accessCode);
